title: How link the sum of subitems to progress

posts.author: Ana (Ana )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

I’m new to Monday and have created a parent activity and a list of subitems. What I want to see is the progress % colomn update when a subitem’s status turns changes to done.

At the moment only the subitems status bar updates but the progress % is unchanged.

Please help!

Ana

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Ana!

I am afraid at this time if you have a progress column set up in your parent item, it will only display the progress of status columns from the parent item, not the subitem. As a workaround however, could you instead set up a progress column in your subitems, and mirror the column into the parent item - as shown in the screenshot below?

Screen Shot 2023-02-24 at 2.33.39 pm1320×808 71.3 KB

Let me know what you think!
